title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Black Swans Everywhere as VLCCs Surge - The most severe conflict in the Middle East in decades has introduced considerable instability into the oil markets, which in turn has impacted tanker shipping operations.
